4f50f705-3220-4b3a-a73a-c2b56e355d91.expected_direction: direction depends on the sign of the macro move, but should be stable in the proposed specification
4f50f705-3220-4b3a-a73a-c2b56e355d91.label: primary
4f50f705-3220-4b3a-a73a-c2b56e355d91.mechanism: Changes in macro expectations alter discount rates and sector-relative earnings expectations.
4f50f705-3220-4b3a-a73a-c2b56e355d91.novelty_usefulness_note: Good default card for a first-pass quant investigation.
4f50f705-3220-4b3a-a73a-c2b56e355d91.thesis: Investigate semis versus defensives. through a measurable macro-to-market transmission channel.
4f50f705-3220-4b3a-a73a-c2b56e355d91.title: Primary macro transmission

caveats.detail: Sector composition effects may confound style interpretation.
caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

caveats.detail: Relative-value framing can hide broad market beta effects.
caveats.label: hypothesis_caveat

7b62b016-b824-4fce-9ffb-04f3d7f3ccb2.expected_direction: defensives outperform when the macro signal is interpreted as growth-negative
7b62b016-b824-4fce-9ffb-04f3d7f3ccb2.label: counterfactual
7b62b016-b824-4fce-9ffb-04f3d7f3ccb2.mechanism: Investors may interpret the macro signal as slower growth rather than lower discount rates.
7b62b016-b824-4fce-9ffb-04f3d7f3ccb2.novelty_usefulness_note: Useful falsification card that forces clearer interpretation.
7b62b016-b824-4fce-9ffb-04f3d7f3ccb2.thesis: If the primary thesis is wrong, defensive sectors should benefit more than growth-sensitive assets under the same macro shift.
7b62b016-b824-4fce-9ffb-04f3d7f3ccb2.title: Counterfactual defensive rotation

84a34aad-7bf5-4ff8-9949-747f73555553.expected_direction: stronger and cleaner directional effect within selected regimes
84a34aad-7bf5-4ff8-9949-747f73555553.label: regime
84a34aad-7bf5-4ff8-9949-747f73555553.mechanism: Transmission strength changes when inflation, policy, or recession risk dominates the narrative.
84a34aad-7bf5-4ff8-9949-747f73555553.novelty_usefulness_note: High usefulness for separating unconditional noise from conditional signal.
84a34aad-7bf5-4ff8-9949-747f73555553.thesis: The relationship should be stronger in specific macro regimes than in unconditional full-sample analysis.
84a34aad-7bf5-4ff8-9949-747f73555553.title: Regime-conditional sensitivity
